artifact.title: Explore typed intake artifact flow

ownership.concurrencyNotes: I-05B producer-owned Work Brief output; final planning/risk analysis is downstream.

producerSignals.ideaContext: A domain-neutral harness needs an exploratory intake path that still produces a typed artifact.
options: Persist one canonical Work Brief JSON carrier
Keep exploratory alternatives as candidate signals
tradeoffs: Exploration notes must not become final planner-owned risk classification
candidateScenarios: A planner consumes the produced Work Brief without reading raw chat

artifact.background:
Input skills should preserve user intent as durable structured data.

artifact.desiredOutcome: The brainstorm producer writes a validator-accepted Work Brief through the common writer.
userVisibleBehavior: Users can start with an unclear idea and still get a plan-ready Work Brief

risksAndUnknowns: Candidate signals may need refinement by plan

artifact.title: Normalize a direct bug request into Work Brief

ownership.concurrencyNotes: I-05B producer-owned Work Brief output; final planning/risk analysis is downstream.

producerSignals.objective: Capture a direct bug request as a typed Work Brief for planning.
producerSignals.request: A generated artifact handoff fails when a malformed carrier is supplied.

artifact.background: Direct task intake should preserve enough bug evidence for planning.
artifact.problemOrOpportunity:
Bug-shaped work is unsafe to plan without observed behavior, expected behavior, and reproduction basis.

Task objective: Capture a direct bug request as a typed Work Brief for planning.
artifact.desiredOutcome: The task producer writes a validator-accepted bug Work Brief through the common writer.
constraints: Use the shared Work Brief artifact class
userVisibleBehavior: Users can submit a direct bug request without bypassing Work Brief persistence
nonGoals: Do not run the bug fix
risksAndUnknowns: Reproduction details may need expansion during planning

acceptanceNotes.description: Produced task Work Brief validates through the artifacts package
Bug-shaped task without reproduction basis fails closed

artifact.observedBehavior: Plan intake reports a malformed carrier when the file is not valid JSON.
artifact.expectedBehavior: Plan intake rejects the carrier with a typed validation result and no downstream plan output.
reproductionSteps: Write a non-JSON file in an allowed intake root
Call plan intake with that relative artifact name
